question_text: How would you design a highly scalable, event-driven serverless data ingestion and processing pipeline on GCP?
hook_text: Scale your data ingestion effortlessly with GCP's powerful event-driven serverless architecture.
cta_text: Master serverless scaling today. Follow for more GCP architecture tips!

answer_sections.title: Event Ingestion with Pub/Sub
answer_sections.text: Pub/Sub ingests events, acting as a buffer. It decouples producers from consumers, ensuring robust, asynchronous delivery. Fan-out enabled.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Pub/Sub ingests events, decoupling producers from consumers, ensuring robust, asynchronous, scalable event delivery.

answer_sections.title: Serverless Processing & Scaling
answer_sections.text: Cloud Run or Functions process events. Auto-scales based on demand, handles concurrent requests, cost-efficient. Ideal for stateless workloads.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Cloud Run or Functions process events, auto-scaling to meet demand. Cost-efficient for stateless, event-triggered workloads.

answer_sections.title: Observability & Data Storage
answer_sections.text: Cloud Logging offers visibility. Cloud Monitoring provides alerts. Processed data to BigQuery, Cloud Storage for analytics. IAM secures.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Logging and Monitoring provide visibility. Processed data stored in BigQuery or Cloud Storage for analytics.
